findings.description: Section s5 contains only '（なし）' (4 chars), which is below the minimum content threshold. This section appears to be a structural placeholder with no substantive content between the handler flow and configuration sections.
findings.source_evidence: No RST h2 heading or substantive content exists between the ハンドラ処理フロー and 設定項目・拡張ポイント sections in the source.
